title: Byju's Digital Technologies is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Byju's Digital Technologies is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Subject Matter Expert looking for your next big career move? Byju's Digital Technologies in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Byju's Digital Technologies:
Byju's Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Byju's Digital Technologies!
